purpose: Demote formal-PDE and Lean/prover arXiv metadata into source leads only after adding a bounded Lean replay rung.

classifications.reason: Lean 4 formal proof paper; relevant to proof-engineering method, not PDE truth.
Lean Copilot; relevant to agent-assisted Lean proof search and tool integration.
Lean 4 formalization paper; relevant as a formalization-process lead.
Lean 4 finance library; relevant as cross-domain proof-packet tooling analog.
Lean 4 finance theorem formalization; relevant as proof-publication analog.
Lean 4 guardrails for agentic systems; relevant to Telos proof/action packets.
Lean declaration search tooling; relevant to next formalization workflow.
Lean 4 formal proof paper; relevant as formal-publication precedent.
Navier-Stokes-adjacent PDE paper; source-body review required before use.
2-D stochastic Navier-Stokes lead; source-body review required before use.
Stochastic PDE stability lead; source-body review required before use.
Stochastic PDE regularity lead; source-body review required before use.

Elliptic PDE regularity lead; source-body review required before use.

boundaries: This gate classifies arXiv metadata only.
It does not establish paper truth, source-body review, latest literature coverage, or exhaustive literature coverage.
It does not promote any PDE result, theorem-prover result, or grand-problem claim.
The high-risk grand-claim row must not be cited as evidence for a solved Millennium problem.
